title: GLua API Snippets Workspace Configuration
description: Schema for workspace overrides (e.g. .glua-api-snippets.json). This file describes the shape of the JSON used to override values from the plugin's default config.lua.

scopes.description: List of scripted class scopes (ENT, SWEP, EFFECT, TOOL, ...)

global.description: Global identifier for the scope (e.g. ENT, SWEP)

folder.description: Relative folder used to match files for this scope

folderIndicators.description: Exact filenames that indicate a folder-based class (e.g. init.lua)

additionalPatterns.description: Lua patterns used to heuristically detect class files in a folder

dtTypes.description: Mapping of DT_* names to Lua types used by NetworkVar resolution

baseGmodMap.description: Set of known built-in base class names (keys) considered equivalent to ENT

accessorForceTypes.description: Mapping of AccessorFunc FORCE_* constants to Lua types

paramNameTypes.description: Best-effort parameter name => type hints used by OnCompileFunctionParam

accessorForceTypesByNumber.description: Numeric Force type map; JSON object keys are strings so numeric-string keys are allowed and will be coerced by the plugin.

patterns.description: Custom Lua pattern overrides used by the plugin to find registrations and assignments
